items.decision: Implemented independent auditor review system with 10 governance checks (AUD-R000 through AUD-R009). Canonical severity model ensures stable FP rate measurement across shadow and enforce modes. Shadow mode allows policy findings but blocks on infra errors.

citations.claim: Auditor review engine with shadow/enforce modes, canonical severity, exit code contract
23 auditor tests covering all rules, modes, severity, and exit codes

confidence_level.rationale: 23 tests passing, canonical severity validated across modes, infra error handling working

expertise_coverage.rationale: Designed fail-closed infra error handling and canonical severity model

pm_first_principles.problem: Worker packets need independent quality review before CEO handoff
pm_first_principles.constraints: Must not block on policy findings in shadow mode, must always block on infra errors
pm_first_principles.logic: Separate policy findings (shadow allows) from infra errors (always block)
pm_first_principles.solution: Exit code contract: 0=PASS, 1=policy BLOCK (enforce only), 2=infra error (always blocks)

items.decision: Established FP ledger schema with composite key (repo_id, run_id, finding_id) and strict annotation workflow. Supports TP/FP verdicts with provenance tracking.

citations.claim: FP ledger schema with composite key and provenance fields

confidence_level.rationale: Schema validated, annotation workflow operational, 100% coverage maintained

expertise_coverage.rationale: Designed composite key schema to prevent duplicate annotations

pm_first_principles.problem: Need to track false-positive rate for auditor findings
pm_first_principles.constraints: Must prevent duplicate annotations, must track provenance
pm_first_principles.logic: Use composite key (repo_id, run_id, finding_id) to uniquely identify findings
pm_first_principles.solution: JSON ledger with annotations array, each entry has composite key and TP/FP verdict

items.decision: Integrated auditor review into phase-end handover as G11 gate. Added finalize path (G09b/G10b) to ensure digest reflects auditor findings even on BLOCK.

citations.claim: G11 auditor gate integration with finalize path for digest rebuild

confidence_level.rationale: G11 gate operational, finalize path working, digest always reflects auditor state

expertise_coverage.rationale: Integrated auditor into phase-end workflow with proper gate ordering

pm_first_principles.problem: Auditor findings need to be visible in CEO digest even when blocking
pm_first_principles.constraints: Digest rebuild must run after G11 BLOCK to capture findings
pm_first_principles.logic: Add finalize path that runs G09b/G10b after G11 regardless of result
pm_first_principles.solution: Primary gate takes precedence, but digest always reflects latest auditor state

items.decision: Added Section IX (Auditor Review Findings) to CEO bridge digest. Implemented stale-file suppression to prevent rendering outdated auditor data.

citations.claim: Section IX rendering with stale-file suppression

confidence_level.rationale: Section IX rendering working, stale-file suppression validated

expertise_coverage.rationale: Implemented stale-file detection to prevent rendering outdated data

pm_first_principles.problem: CEO digest needs auditor findings visibility
pm_first_principles.constraints: Must not render stale auditor data from previous runs
pm_first_principles.logic: Only render Section IX when auditor data is explicitly passed as source
pm_first_principles.solution: Source-based detection: digest builder never auto-discovers auditor files from disk

items.decision: Defined 5-condition promotion gate for shadow-to-enforce transition. Criteria: 24B close, 30+ items, 2+ consecutive weeks, <5% FP rate, all v2.0.0 packets.

confidence_level.rationale: Promotion criteria defined, numeric thresholds validated

expertise_coverage.rationale: Designed numeric criteria to ensure statistical significance

pm_first_principles.problem: Need objective criteria for shadow-to-enforce promotion
pm_first_principles.constraints: Must ensure statistical significance and cross-repo readiness
pm_first_principles.logic: Combine volume (30+ items), consistency (2+ weeks), quality (<5% FP), and readiness (24B close)
pm_first_principles.solution: 5-condition gate with automated validation (C0, C2-C5) and manual signoff (C1)

items.decision: Implemented auditor calibration system with 7 rules (AUD-R000 through AUD-R009), FP ledger schema, and promotion dossier. Fixed 9 critical gaps in calibration script (status schema, BOM encoding, consecutive weeks logic, items counting, timestamp validation, ledger validation, output paths). First shadow cycle complete with 3 C/H findings (100% annotated as TP). Dossier currently blocks on C2 (1/30 items) and C3 (0/2 weeks) as expected on Day 1 of shadow window.

citations.claim: Calibration reporting with weekly/dossier modes, C0-C5 validation, FP rate tracking, consecutive weeks logic
28 calibration tests covering BOM encoding, consecutive weeks, items counting, ledger validation, all gap fixes
FP ledger with 3 annotations (all TP) from first shadow run 20260303_141757
First weekly report: 1 run, 3 C/H findings, 100% coverage, 0% FP rate

confidence_level.rationale: All 51 tests passing (23 auditor + 28 calibration). First shadow run executed successfully. FP ledger operational. Dossier validation working. Remaining work is operational (accumulate shadow data), not implementation.

expertise_coverage.rationale: Designed fail-closed validation architecture, schema versioning, and promotion criteria (C0-C5)
Implemented infra health checks (C0), FP rate tracking (C4), and annotation coverage gates (C4b)
Created 51 tests covering all gap fixes, edge cases, and operational scenarios

pm_first_principles.problem: Auditor rules need calibration evidence before enforce-mode promotion. Without FP rate tracking and promotion criteria, we risk false blocks in production.
pm_first_principles.constraints: Must maintain 100% C/H annotation coverage. Must accumulate 30+ items across 2+ consecutive weeks. Must keep FP rate <5%. Must use fail-closed validation (exit 2 for all infra errors).
pm_first_principles.logic: Implement weekly calibration reports to track FP rate and coverage. Implement dossier mode to validate all 5 automated criteria (C0, C2-C5). Use shadow mode to collect evidence without blocking handovers. Transition to enforce only after dossier exits 0 and C1 manual signoff.
pm_first_principles.solution: Created auditor_calibration_report.py with weekly/dossier modes. Fixed 9 critical gaps (status schema, BOM encoding, consecutive weeks logic, items counting, timestamp validation, ledger validation, output paths). Executed first shadow cycle with 100% annotation. System ready for 2-week shadow window.
